Vendored copy of LovePlusProject/NLPPATCH for offline use.

Upstream: https://github.com/LovePlusProject/NLPPATCH
Release:  NLPPATCH.2017.08.15 (v1.0) — ~168/577 scripts (~28%)

Layout:
  vendor/NLPPATCH/                 — git tree snapshot (docs, PLUGIN SUPPORT, notes)
  vendor/NLPPATCH/release/         — release zip payload (Windows-safe paths)
    romfs/script/bin/script/*.dbin2
    romfs/SystemData/TextResource/
    000f4e00.code
    README.txt / NEW SAVE DATA.png

Nested .git was removed so these files are owned by EngPatcher.
Deploy scripts with:  python src/deploy_nlppatch_scripts.py
